name: 12q12_ARFGAP1_SD
description: 12q12 pericentromeric segmental duplication interval flanking ARFGAP1, PTHLH and the LRRK2-flanking 12q12 region. Pericentromeric SDs shared with other acrocentric / pericentromeric regions complicate assembly through the chr12 centromere.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric SD modules of 10-100 kb at 92-98% identity; shared duplicons with chr2p, chr10q, chr16p pericentromeric SD pile-ups.
